info.title: StudyBond API
info.description: StudyBond backend API reference for web, mobile, admin, and internal engineering workflows.

bearerAuth.description: Paste the StudyBond access token as `Bearer <token>`.

post.description: Register a new user account and send an email verification OTP
Login user. Premium device registration may require OTP approval.
Verify an email OTP or a premium device OTP depending on auth state
Request a password reset OTP. Response is generic to avoid account enumeration.
Request a fresh password reset OTP for an existing pending reset challenge. Response is generic to avoid account enumeration.
Reset a password using a valid password reset OTP. This invalidates all active sessions.
Refresh access token using refresh token

get.description: Returns the authenticated user and session context for the current access token.

post.description: Logout the current session while keeping the registered device record intact.
Starts a new exam session with selected subjects.
Submits answers for an in-progress exam and returns scored results.

get.description: Gets questions for an in-progress exam. Used for resuming after page refresh.
Gets paginated list of user exams with aggregate statistics.
Gets full details for a completed exam including answers and explanations.

post.description: Creates a retake of a completed exam. Questions and options are shuffled.
Abandons an in-progress exam. No SP is earned.
Create a new question in the admin question bank.

get.description: List questions with filtering and pagination for admin moderation and content management.

post.description: Upload a question, option, or explanation image to Cloudinary and receive the managed asset metadata required for create/update flows.

get.description: Fetch a single question from the admin question bank.

put.description: Update a question in the admin question bank.

delete.description: Delete a question that is safe to remove from the question bank.

post.description: Upload a CSV or Excel file to create many questions at once.

get.description: Return high-level operational analytics for the admin command center.
Return activity trends for a configurable trailing day window.
Return infrastructure and runtime health signals for the admin command center.
Return premium conversion, entitlement, and revenue analytics for superadmins.
Return a consolidated operations view for a single user.

post.description: Issue a short-lived superadmin step-up challenge for sensitive actions.
Verify the OTP for a superadmin step-up challenge and mint a short-lived step-up token.

get.description: List users with admin-side filters for support and moderation workflows.

post.description: Ban a user account and record the moderation reason.
Restore access to a previously banned user.
Remove a registered premium device on behalf of a user and deactivate sessions on that device.

delete.description: Backward-compatible legacy device removal endpoint. Prefer the canonical user-scoped route.

post.description: Promote a user to ADMIN or SUPERADMIN. Sensitive superadmin action.
Demote an admin or superadmin back to USER. Sensitive superadmin action.

get.description: List users that currently have premium access.
Return payment and manual entitlement history for a single user.

post.description: Manually grant premium access. Sensitive superadmin action.
Manually extend premium access. Sensitive superadmin action.
Manually revoke premium access. Sensitive superadmin action.

get.description: Return current admin-managed platform settings.

post.description: Enable or disable transactional email delivery. Sensitive superadmin action.

get.description: Browse the admin audit trail with filters.

get.summary: Get authenticated user achievements and badge progress
Get the authenticated user security overview with active sessions and registered premium devices

patch.summary: Change the authenticated user password and sign out other active sessions

post.summary: Save a question to the authenticated user bookmark list

get.summary: List active bookmarks for the authenticated user
Get one bookmark owned by the authenticated user

delete.summary: Remove one bookmark owned by the authenticated user

get.summary: List reports created by the authenticated user
Get one report owned by the authenticated user

delete.summary: Delete one pending report owned by the authenticated user

get.summary: List reports for the admin moderation queue
Get the authenticated user streak summary
Get the authenticated user streak calendar

post.description: Creates a new 1v1 collaboration room and returns its session snapshot.

get.description: Fetches a collaboration session snapshot using a room code.
Alias of /code/:code for legacy client compatibility.

post.description: Joins a waiting 1v1 room by code.
Alias of /code/:code/join for legacy client compatibility.
Host starts a waiting 1v1 session. Both participants receive the same question set.

get.description: Returns the full collaboration session snapshot for participants.

post.description: Leaves a collaboration session. If host leaves while waiting, the session is cancelled.
Host-only cancellation for waiting or in-progress collaboration sessions.

patch.description: Host-only while waiting. Set customName to null to reset to default generated name.

get.description: Returns top users ranked by weekly SP (resets weekly) inside the resolved institution scope.
Returns top users ranked by total SP across all time inside the resolved institution scope.
Returns the current user rank in both weekly and all-time ladders for the resolved institution scope.

post.description: Paystack webhook endpoint for confirmed subscription payments.

get.description: Get the current premium subscription status for the signed-in user.

post.description: Create a Paystack checkout session for the fixed 5-month StudyBond premium plan.
Verify a Paystack transaction reference and activate premium access if payment succeeded.
Turn off future auto-renew intent for the current premium subscription.

get.description: Basic uptime and service liveness signal.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Account registration, login, verification, token refresh, and password recovery.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Authenticated user profile, security, and account settings.

tags.name: Exams
tags.description: Exam lifecycle endpoints including start, submit, history, retake, and abandon.

tags.name: Collaboration
tags.description: 1v1 collaboration session lifecycle and realtime session bootstrapping.

tags.name: Leaderboard
tags.description: Weekly, all-time, and self-rank leaderboard reads.

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: Premium plan checkout, verification, cancellation, and webhook handling.

tags.name: Bookmarks
tags.description: User bookmark creation, updates, retrieval, and deletion.

tags.name: Admin Reports
tags.description: Admin moderation queue for question reports.

tags.name: Questions
tags.description: Admin-managed question bank CRUD and bulk upload.

tags.name: Streaks
tags.description: Streak summary and streak calendar endpoints.
